messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- A: growth archetype
- ABBV: growth archetype
- ADBE: growth archetype
- AKAM: growth archetype
- ALGN: growth archetype
- ALL: growth archetype
- ALLE: growth archetype
- AMCR: growth archetype
- AMD: growth archetype
- ARE: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Why Graphic Packaging Stock Trounced the Market on Tuesday - AOL.com
    Summary: Why Graphic Packaging Stock Trounced the Market on Tuesday AOL.com

[1] Title: Earnings call transcript: Karat Packaging Q1 2026 beats EPS expectations, stock rises - Investing.com Nigeria
    Summary: Earnings call transcript: Karat Packaging Q1 2026 beats EPS expectations, stock rises Investing.com Nigeria

[2] Title: Why Optimum Communications (OPTU) Shares Are Plunging Today - StockStory
    Summary: Why Optimum Communications (OPTU) Shares Are Plunging Today StockStory

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Graphic Packaging (GPK) news does not involve any held positions (A, ABBV, ADBE, AKAM, ALGN, ALL, ALLE, AMCR, AMD, ARE)."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Karat Packaging (KPAT) earnings do not involve any held positions."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Optimum Communications (OPTU) stock movement does not involve any held positions."
  }
]
```
